$comment: Presence of this file enables the dispatch-auto Pi extension in this repo. Empty config = all worker roles use pi defaults. Add per-role overrides only when needed.

$schema_notes.timeoutMinutes: Optional root-level wall-clock cap per subprocess. Default 15 min. Override per role under roles.<Role>.timeoutMinutes. Env DISPATCH_AUTO_TIMEOUT_MS=<millis> wins over both for one-off runs.
$schema_notes.roles.<Role>.binary: 'pi' (default) or 'claude'. Claude integration uses --session-id on first call and --resume <uuid> after, with cycle isolation per channel.
$schema_notes.roles.<Role>.configDir: Sets CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR (claude) or PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR (pi). Use '~/.claude-acct1' to point claude at a specific account.
$schema_notes.roles.<Role>.extraArgs: Appended to the launch command before the prompt. Examples: ['--effort','low'] for claude, ['--thinking','low'] for pi.
